To: R. Adekanmi
From: PC
Subject: A read on yesterday — for you only

R — one thing before you settle on "that went well." I think the room was leaning toward a fast-follow more than it looked.

Tom pushed the fast-follow line twice, and Priya backed him almost immediately in nearly the same words — that quick echo usually means they'd talked beforehand, so treat it as two aligned voices, not two independent ones. And the sponsor saying "let me reflect" with no decision often means the decision is being made outside the room rather than in it. So I'd be a bit more cautious than "he's supportive."

What I'd suggest: before next week, get fifteen minutes with the sponsor directly so you're not finding out the decision in the next meeting — go in with a clear, short case for keeping Federation in Q4, and maybe a version of what "good" looks like if it does become a fast-follow, so you're not caught flat-footed either way.

Keeping this to you — not for the minutes.

PC
